PARTY.description: A legal entity (person, company, organization) named in the contract.

OBLIGATION.description: A duty or commitment one party owes another.

TERM.description: A named defined term introduced in the agreement.

HAS_OBLIGATION.description: Links a PARTY to an OBLIGATION they owe.

EXPIRES_ON.description: Links an OBLIGATION or TERM to a termination date.

description: Test contract domain for FT-020 end-to-end wizard bypass.
system_context: You are analyzing a test contract domain.
extraction_guidelines: Extract PARTY, OBLIGATION, TERM entities and their relations.
